--The signboard, lit in spite of the sun, caught my eye.

Before I knew it, I realized I'd walked right to the door of one of the few establishments of 
this town.
It was one of those so called love hotels. Of course, I've never been inside before,
nor was I going to do it today. But if I were to do it... Shino, no.
...I'd love to go in with Rino nee-san instead.
Is it not just the perfect place to get shown the ropes firsthand by a proper
adult like her? Ah, not to say that I don't want to come with Shino really
I'd love to but rather it's more about the first experience being with a lewdoneesanyoukno....
\sa[133]\SM[nod]\SE[20-nb]Woah there~, young man. What are you doing in a place like this~?
As if she'd materialized straight out of my imagination, Rino nee-san
walked out of the hotel and called out to me.
It can't be, she wasn't 'making use' of it with a man, was she...?!
\SE[2]Ah, I bet you're thinking weird stuff~. Ahahah--, it was for my job, you know?
...It's true that it was only her that came out of there.
Seems like she wasn't using it for the naughty purposes I was imagining after all.
Still, even if it was for her job, it's pretty amazing that she just walked out so openly.
If it was me, I'd have tried to sneak out even if it was for work.
\sa[124]\SE[22-nb]Fufuh--... aren't you curious... about what it's like inside?
\sa[133]\SE[20-nb]In that case, want to go in there together~... next time?
I couldn't help but open my eyes wide at the feeling of being closer
than ever to the fantasy that I just had.
Even though I know it's just a joke, I fall for it everytime anyway.
I wonder if it's because I keep hoping that maybe one day I really
I'm sorry, Shino... but I just cannot put up a fight
against Rino nee-san and her beauty.
-- Please let me live it up, if only in my mind.
\SE[2]I'll keep it a secret from Shino-chan, how about it? I'm joking, by the way.
\SE[0]\SM[pop]Fufuh--, well then, we're going to go back to the company~♪
スライドスピード = def
If only I could work alongside her one day, though I say that but
it's not like I'm putting any effort into anything towards that.
And so I continued killing time by walking around town.
Would you like to view [Rino's Viewpoint]?
(You can view it at any time from the Room of Recollections.)

\SE[21-nb]See ya~. It's dark out so be careful on the way home~♪
\SM[nod]\SE[8]The me who wants to get some nice drink in vs the me who
wants to get home quick and treasure Shino-chan... Fight--!
\SM[nod]\SE[20-nb]Wait...? Wouldn't getting one or two drinks in and then going home and
pestering Shino-chan be the best combo...? Clang-Clang-Claaang, Draw!
Ahahah, looks like I showed you something embarrassing...
\sa[133]\SE[20-nb]Ufufuh~, that's right~, I was thinking of hitting up the bar
\SE[1]I'd love to go in with you, but that really would be too much.
Let's go in together when you grow up big and strong, okay?
A night out at the bar with a mature adult woman. It's a realm yet beyond
my comprehension, but I'm sure it's the combination of dreams.
I wouldn't want to get in her way, so I gave her a quick wave
and then left the place behind.
\SE[21-nb]Yeah, see ya. It's dark out so be careful on the way home~♪
Seems like a real jovial foreigner has been frequenting that bar over there lately.
This street's got a whole lot of entertainment options, it's so convenient.
If you want a real and serious relationship, you gotta be faithful to your girl.
I think it's good to look back upon the past, every now and then.
There might be some hidden signs in your life, when a big event's about to happen.
It's easy to start from the beginning, but I'd also recommend saving often.
